channel.title: FnO Play on Tech Tracker
channel.description: Recent content in FnO Play on Tech Tracker

item.title: FnO Play - No AMC charges & No fees On Non-Profitable Trades In India.
item.description: <img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-qFVabf9W35o/YPW7IchxkcI/AAAAAAAAF54/ud9sKMyrC68GDXBT72ebqhzSgda8nnYXQCLcBGAsYHQ/s1600/1626716916256268-0.png" alt=""> We have numerous mobile trading apps available out there on internet like upstox, zerodha, but most trading apps charge you monthly fee for using thier platform which is sometimes feels little costly if user don’t trade or use thier trading platform so, even if the user want to close his demat trading account user must have to pay AMC fees else his demat account will remain open and amc charges will continue until user pay annual maintenance charges.
